text:
To solve this problem, use a sliding window approach with a dictionary to track character frequencies in both the string and the anagram. 
```python
from collections import Counter

def find_anagrams(s, p):
    p_count = Counter(p)
    s_count = Counter()
    anagrams = []
    for i, c in enumerate(s):
        s_count[c] += 1
        if i >= len(p):
            s_count[s[i - len(p)]] -= 1
            if s_count[s[i - len(p)]] == 0:
                del s_count[s[i - len(p)]]
        if i >= len(p) - 1 and s_count == p_count:
            anagrams.append(i - len(p) + 1)
    return anagrams
```
